title: Bucket Hues
description: Different hues of water in the fish buckets to be more in line with the tadpole bucket.
body:
This texture pack alters cod, salmon, pufferfish and tropical fish buckets to have slighty different hues in the water present in those sprites, referencing the water color of one of the biomes you can find the fish in. Salmon and cod buckets have a color reminiscent of colder biomes, while pufferfish and tropical fish buckets have the color used for warm oceans.

- the pack's zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required.
